source_title: FDA Warning Letter — Granules India Limited (MARCS-CMS 697115 / Warning Letter 320-25-48)
issuing_body: U.S. Food and Drug Administration, Center for Drug Evaluation and Research (CDER), Office of Compliance, Office of Manufacturing Quality
notes: Public FDA Warning Letter. Numerous (b)(4) redactions in the original are preserved verbatim. Three numbered CGMP violations (21 CFR 211.67(b), 211.58, 211.68(a)) plus a separate 'Concerns with CGMP records' finding. Firm response of September 27, 2024 was reviewed and judged inadequate for each numbered violation. No specific products or lot numbers are named; affected products, equipment, and components are redacted. Letter dated 2025-02-26, content current as of 2025-03-04 per FDA page footer.
